prompt:
A cinematic, premium product-photography portrait of an assembled DIALED HEALTH protector tube — a short stout cylindrical container with a solid-black cap on top embossed 'DIALED' and a white plastic body below embossed 'HEALTH'. The tube floats in the very center of a 9:16 vertical frame, slightly tilted at a 3/4 angle so its cap is at the top and we can see the cap, the side wall with the embossed DIALED HEALTH text reading top-down, and a hint of the body's bottom.

The protector tube must match the SECOND provided reference image (the locked line-art protector tube anchor) EXACTLY in shape, proportions, and text orientation — short stubby pill-bottle silhouette, cap and body sharing the same wide diameter, DIALED embossed on the black cap with the first D at the top reading top-down forward, HEALTH embossed on the white body with the first H at the top reading top-down forward, both words in the same book-spine sideways letter rotation. Render this as a REALISTIC 3D-rendered product, not as line-art — the cap is glossy black plastic, the body is matte white plastic, the embossed text is deeply debossed/embossed into the plastic surface and catches light along its raised/recessed edges.

The FIRST reference image (the real product photo protector tube top.png) is the truest reference for surface finish, embossing depth, and material — match its physicality.

BACKDROP: a deep moody cinematic black-to-dark-navy gradient background with subtle volumetric haze, like a high-end product launch shot or a luxury cosmetic ad. A single warm soft key-light from the upper-left catches the cap's top edge and the upper-right side of the cylinder with a glowing rim-light, casting a soft falloff into shadow on the opposite side. A second cool blue-tinted rim-light from the lower-right traces the body's bottom edge and back-right contour, creating a duotone cinematic light wrap (warm white + cool blue). A soft luminous halo glows around the entire tube silhouette — a faint outline glow tracing the cap and body edges and the embossed DIALED HEALTH text, like the tube is energized or radiating. Subtle volumetric light shafts and atmospheric particles drift through the air around the tube. A subtle ground reflection / mirror floor beneath the tube catches a soft fade-off reflection.

FRAMING: 9:16 vertical portrait. The tube sits centered, occupying the middle ~40% of the vertical frame height. Generous breathing room of dark atmospheric backdrop above and below the tube. No text overlay, no logos other than the embossed DIALED HEALTH on the tube itself, no frame, no border.

STYLE: ultra-cinematic, hyper-realistic, premium product-photography quality. Crisp focus on the tube, soft cinematic bokeh and atmospheric haze in the backdrop. Color grade is moody and luxurious — deep blacks, warm gold highlights, cool blue rims, subtle white glow on the tube's silhouette. No painterly or illustrative qualities — pure high-end product render.
refImages: DIaled Health Instruction Graphics/Product Refs/protector tube top.png
